message:
fix(context): Keep suggestedCassQueries semantically pure

- Stop merging degraded.cass.suggestedFix into suggestedCassQueries
- suggestedCassQueries now contains only search commands (cass search ...)
- Remediation commands (cm doctor, cass health) remain in degraded.cass.suggestedFix
- Agents can now reliably interpret suggestedCassQueries as runnable search queries

Part of 75kt: Context output - separate remediation from suggestedCassQueries
